CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver granted. (No opposition filed). The Court appoints Richard B. Cole as receiver for the purpose of transferring the alcoholic beverage license on the judgment debtor's business premises in the manner provided in CCP 708.360. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2008 Continued To Apr-18-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
